header.title: HTML Formatter — Format, Minify & Beautify HTML Online
header.description: Free online HTML formatter to format, minify, and beautify HTML code with customizable indentation. Validate syntax, compress for production, or expand for readability. Essential tool for web developers.
header.keywords: html formatter, html beautifier, html minifier, format html online, html pretty print, html code formatter, html validator, html indentation

howToUse.title: How to Use the HTML Formatter
howToUse.step1Desc: Paste your HTML code into the input area. The tool works with full documents or fragments.
howToUse.step2Desc: Adjust indentation, toggle attribute sorting, comment removal, and whitespace collapsing.
howToUse.step3Desc: Switch between Formatted, Minified, or Preview to see the rendered HTML in a sandboxed iframe.
howToUse.step4Desc: Copy the formatted or minified HTML, or download it for use in your project.

items.question: Can this tool validate my HTML?
items.answer: Yes. The tool checks for unclosed tags, invalid attributes, and other common syntax issues.

items.question: What is the Preview mode?
items.answer: Preview mode renders your HTML inside a sandboxed iframe so you can see the live result.

items.question: Can I remove HTML comments?
items.answer: Yes. Enable the Remove Comments option to strip all HTML comments from the output.

items.question: Does the tool support attribute sorting?
items.answer: Yes. When enabled, attributes within each tag are sorted alphabetically for consistency.

output.emptyPreview: Paste HTML to see a live preview
